KAREN_STRIKE.title: Strike
KAREN_DEFEND.title: Defend
KAREN_SHINE_KEYWORD.title: Shine
KAREN_SHINE_KEYWORD.description: Each time this card is played, its [gold]Shine[/gold] decreases by 1. When it reaches 0, the card is permanently removed from your deck.
KAREN_SHINE_STRIKE.title: Shine Strike
KAREN_SHINE_DEFEND.title: Shine Defend
KAREN_PROMISE_DEFEND.title: Promise Defense
KAREN_PROMISE_DEFEND.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Put {Cards:diff()} card(s) from your hand into the [gold]Promise Pile[/gold].
KAREN_PROMISE_DRAW.title: Fulfill Promise
KAREN_PROMISE_DRAW.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Take {Cards:diff()} card(s) from the [gold]Promise Pile[/gold] into your hand.
KAREN_PLACEHOLDER_POWER.title: Placeholder Power
KAREN_PLACEHOLDER_POWER.description: [gray]A placeholder power card. No effect yet.[/gray]
KAREN_PLACEHOLDER_UNCOMMON_SKILL.title: Placeholder Uncommon Skill
KAREN_PLACEHOLDER_UNCOMMON_SKILL.descrip: [gray]A placeholder uncommon skill card. No effect yet.[/gray]
KAREN_PLACEHOLDER_RARE_SKILL.title: Placeholder Rare Skill
KAREN_PLACEHOLDER_RARE_SKILL.description: [gray]A placeholder rare skill card. No effect yet.[/gray]
KAREN_CHARGE_STRIKE.title: Charge Strike
KAREN_CHARGE_STRIKE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply -{StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] to the target.
KAREN_DEBUT.title: Debut
KAREN_DEBUT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times to ALL enemies.
KAREN_SWORD_UP.title: Sword Up
KAREN_SHINE_STRIKE_BARRAGE.title: Shine Through Me
KAREN_TO_THE_STAGE.title: To The Stage
KAREN_POTATO.title: Potato
KAREN_DROP_FUEL.title: Drop Fuel
KAREN_READY.title: Ready
KAREN_NONON.title: NONNON
KAREN_NONON.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply -{StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] to ALL enemies this turn.
KAREN_DRINK_WATER.title: Hydration
KAREN_DRINK_WATER.description: Prevent the next time you would lose HP.
KAREN_PRACTICE.title: Practice
KAREN_SUNLIGHT.title: Sunlight
KAREN_SUNLIGHT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When [gold]Shine[/gold] depletes, you may add this card to your draw pile.
KAREN_CONTINUE02.title: Endless Stage
KAREN_CARRYING_GUILT.title: Carrying Our Guilt
KAREN_CARRYING_GUILT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, plus {ExtraDamage:diff()} for each card in your [gold]Shine Pile[/gold].
KAREN_STAR_FRIEND.title: Star Friend
KAREN_STAR_FRIEND.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If this kills the target, gain a random [gold]Shine[/gold] card.
KAREN_LETTER_CARD.title: Letter
KAREN_LETTER_CARD.description: Whenever you put a card into the [gold]Promise Pile[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
KAREN_STARLIGHT_CARD.title: Starlight
KAREN_STARLIGHT_CARD.description: Whenever you play a [gold]Shine[/gold] card, play it {Repeat:diff()} more time(s), then [gold]deplete[/gold] its [gold]Shine[/gold].
KAREN_STARLIGHT03_CARD.title: Starlight
KAREN_FALL.title: Fallen
KAREN_FALL.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Put 1 card from your hand into the [gold]Promise Pile[/gold].
KAREN_SLEEPY.title: Sleepy
KAREN_SLEEPY.description: Unplayable. [gold]Ethereal[/gold]. Cannot be removed from your deck.
KAREN_STAGE_REASON.title: Stage Reason
